scripts.audit:home: python3 -m http.server 8091 & sleep 2 && npx lighthouse http://127.0.0.1:8091/ --output json --output-path docs/audits/lighthouse-home.json --chrome-flags="--headless --no-sandbox" --only-categories=performance,accessibility,best-practices,seo && npx @axe-core/cli http://127.0.0.1:8091/ --save docs/audits/axe-home.json; pkill -f 'http.server 8091' || true
scripts.audit:ch1: python3 -m http.server 8091 & sleep 2 && npx lighthouse "http://127.0.0.1:8091/slides.html?chapter=ch1&slide=1" --output json --output-path docs/audits/lighthouse-ch1.json --chrome-flags="--headless --no-sandbox" --only-categories=performance,accessibility,best-practices,seo && npx @axe-core/cli "http://127.0.0.1:8091/slides.html?chapter=ch1&slide=1" --save docs/audits/axe-ch1.json; pkill -f 'http.server 8091' || true
